title: 1. Scaffold console app
description: Scaffold console/ with Vite React TypeScript. Add Tailwind, PostCSS, Shadcn UI config, Radix color imports, GSAP dependencies, and system dark mode via Tailwind darkMode media.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Scaffolded console/ directory and base Vite React structure manually (package.json, tsconfig, vite config, tailwind config, base styles).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added console/.gitignore for node_modules and dist.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added console/src/vite-env.d.ts for Vite client typing.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added font loading for IBM Plex Sans and Space Grotesk in console/index.html.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: console/ runs with npm run dev; Tailwind + Shadcn components build; theme variables present; no UI toggle for dark mode; Radix color CSS available; GSAP installed.
